options: Lets Meta deliver where it performs best, maximizing reach and efficiency
questions.explanation: More surfaces = more auctions to optimize; the recommended default.

questions.q: Restricting placements with no business reason usually:
options: Raises the cost per result and reduces delivery
questions.explanation: Fewer placements limit optimization: it raises cost and reduces delivery.

questions.q: Why is the creative a cost lever in the auction?
options: It affects estimated action rates and ad quality (part of the total value)
questions.explanation: A relevant/quality creative raises those components and can win auctions more cheaply.
It adapts crops, brightness, music and text per person.

questions.q: When IS restricting placements justified? Select 2.
options: A brand requirement that prohibits certain surfaces
The creative is not suitable for some placement
Aesthetic preference with no business reason
To make the report look simpler
questions.explanation: Only with a real reason (brand or unsuitable creative). Aesthetics with no business reason doesn't justify raising cost.

options: Vertical (9:16), brand early, legible without sound
One image for the entire campaign
Long text on top of the image
questions.explanation: Vertical consumption and often sound-off; brand early.

questions.q: Why several creatives per ad set?
options: They give material to find the best person-creative combination and reduce fatigue
questions.explanation: Creative diversity broadens the optimization room and delays fatigue.

questions.q: Consumer brand, broad and efficient reach, has a vertical video, images and carousel:
options: Advantage+ placements + several vertical creatives + Advantage+ creative
questions.explanation: Maximizing surfaces and creative variety with automatic adaptation performs better.

options: The surfaces where the ad appears across Meta technologies
questions.explanation: Feeds, Stories, Reels, In-stream, Marketplace, Search, Audience Network, etc.

questions.q: A client wants full control because their creative doesn't work in a certain third-party vertical format. What do you do?
options: Advantage+ placements anyway, without touching anything
Manual placements excluding that surface for a creative reason
questions.explanation: There's a real reason (unsuitable creative): restricting that placement manually is justified.
